basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (BHU) Varanasi (IIT (BHU) Varanasi) has published the Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. BT/PR61643/BME/172/90/2025. The recruitment drive aims to fill Junior Research Fellow positions. Candidates up to 28 years of age holding a B.S. (4-year programme), MBBS, Integrated BS-MS, M.Sc., B.E., B.Tech., or equivalent degree with at least 55% marks and a valid NET/ DBT JRF Category 2/ GATE qualification are eligible to apply through Email on or before 09 August 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and applicatio

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/women/physically handicapped candidates as per GoI rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.S. 4 years programme/ MBBS/ Integrated BS-MS/ MSc/ BE/ BTech or equivalent degree, with 55% marks and passing of NET/ DBT JRF Category 2/GATE test
qualification.details: B.S. 4 years programme/MBBS/Integrated BS-MS/MSc/BE/BTech or equivalent degree, with 55% marks and passing of NET/ DBT JRF Category 2/GATE test.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT BHU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow position is 09-08-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.S. 4 years programme/MBBS/Integrated BS-MS/MSc/BE/BTech or equivalent degree with at least 55% marks and have passed NET/DBT JRF Category 2/GATE.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Junior Research Fellow is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT BHU located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology (BHU) Varanasi is located in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 221005.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from all eligible states can apply for this position, provided they meet the educational and age criteria. The application is open to all eligible individuals.
